name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkSymbol
summary: The SectionMarkSymbol class is for section mark attributes related to the shape of the connecting symbol.

constructors.name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkSymbol()
constructors.summary: Creates a new section mark symbol instance.

constructors.name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkSymbol(SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkSymbol.SymbolShapes, Double, Point)
constructors.signature: public SectionMarkSymbol(SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkSymbol.SymbolShapes shape, double size, Point position)
constructors.summary: Creates a new section mark symbol instance with the given shape, size and position.

params.name: shape
params.doc: The shape of the section mark symbol to be used.

params.name: size
params.doc: The size of the section mark symbol to be used.

params.name: position
params.doc: The position of the section mark symbol to be used.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Position
properties.summary: The position of the section mark symbol.

properties.name: Shape
properties.summary: The shape of the section mark symbol.

properties.name: Size
properties.summary: The size of the section mark symbol.
